---
name: Error Report
about: Report a problem with a digest (wrong URL, bad summary, missing item, etc.)
title: "[Digest Error] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What went wrong?

<!-- Pick one or describe your own -->

- [ ] **Wrong URL** — The link doesn't go to the article described
- [ ] **Broken link** — 404, redirect, or page won't load
- [ ] **Wrong article** — The link works but points to a different story
- [ ] **Bad summary** — The summary doesn't match the article
- [ ] **Missing item** — A major story was left out
- [ ] **Other** — Describe below

## Digest details

- **Date:** <!-- e.g. 2026-03-03 -->
- **Category:** <!-- e.g. Top Stories, Models & Benchmarks -->
- **Item number:** <!-- e.g. 3 -->
